title: Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2022 Financial Results

Key Financial Results

Revenue for Q3 2022 was $1,128 million, compared to $1,064 million in the prior year, representing a 6% increase year-over-year. Daily active users were 363 million in Q3 2022, an increase of 19% year-over-year. Net loss was $287 million, compared to a net loss of $72 million in the prior year.

Adjusted EBITDA

Adjusted EBITDA was $(3) million in Q3 2022, compared to $41 million in the prior year, reflecting challenges in the advertising market.

Market Headwinds

Snap cited ongoing macroeconomic uncertainties and advertiser pullbacks as headwinds. The company did not provide specific guidance for Q4 2022, citing uncertainties in the operating environment. Apple's iOS privacy changes continued to impact the company's ability to optimize advertising campaigns.

Strategic Response

The company announced a restructuring plan to reduce operating expenses and improve efficiency. Management indicated that Q4 2022 was tracking toward low single-digit revenue growth, significantly below historical performance.
